ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Geographic area of the county in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 12-15 years, 50-64 years) */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Start age of the age group */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* End age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data was collected */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group associated with the data */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine type */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total doses administered in that age group */,
  "people_vaccinated_one_dose" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated with at least one dose */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "date_of_data" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "total_population_in_age_group" INTEGER /* Total population in the age group for the given county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the health department */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the campaign is being conducted */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., drive, clinic) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_population" INTEGER /* Target population for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_campaigns_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_types" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the vaccine */,
  "dose_schedule" TEXT /* Recommended dose schedule (e.g., 0, 3 weeks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doses_administered" (
  "dose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dose record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination record in the vaccination_data table */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (e.g., 1 for first dose, 2 for second dose) */,
  "date_administered" TEXT /* Date the dose was administered */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the dose was administered */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider who administered the dose */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Any reported side effects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doses_administered_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doses_administered_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., data entry, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action took place */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table affected by the action */,
  "affected_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows affected by the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county for which the statistics are calculated */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group for which the statistics are calculated */,
  "total_doses" INTEGER /* Total doses administered for that age group */,
  "total_people_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of people vaccinated */,
  "percentage_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "percentage_fully_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of the population fully vaccinated */,
  "date_of_statistics" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_statistics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_statistics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
